domain: Bird cryptochrome radical-pair magnetoreception — light-induced FAD-tryptophan radical pair; spin oscillation magnetic-field-sensitive.
specific_mechanism: Quantum radical pair: two unpaired electrons oscillate between singlet/triplet; magnetic field biases oscillation; downstream chemistry yields direction signal.
llm_application: CRYPTO-PROBE: paired-prompt diagnostic. For each model evaluation, run prompt P and perturbed P+δ; measure angular drift between output activation vectors. Drift vector reveals model's 'orientation in feature space' — used for drift detection, alignment-shift diagnosis, distribution-shift detection.
novelty_claim: Paired prompting + contrastive evaluation are mainstream. Activation steering uses paired-prompt difference. CRYPTO-PROBE re-frames as magnetic-compass but mechanism is paired-prompt drift.
